song.title: God The Creator Became A God-man
song.lyrics: [V1] . F C Dm C God the Creator became a God-man, . A# F G C His death redeemed us for His glorious plan. . F C A# C Now in resurrection the Spirit’s released . A# Gm Producing the church. . C7 F This is God’s masterpiece. [V2] . F C Lord, You are my choice. .A# C I have seen Your beauty. .A# F I belong to You .G C Now and evermore. .F C You’re my only choice .Dm Am Lord, You are so lovely. .A# Gm C7 F Lord I give all for Your masterpiece. --- [V3] .F C Lord, I love You. .Dm C There is no other. .A# F G C I’ll love You always. .F C Lord, I love You. . A# C My heart is recovered. .A# Gm C7 F Lord, I give all for Your masterpiece. [V4] .F C Dm C Thank You, Lord Jesus, for capturing me. .A# F G C Thank You, Lord, I now experience Thee. . F C By feasting! Enjoying! . A# C Your Life would increase. .A# Thank You, Lord, .Gm C7 F I’m part of God’s masterpiece.
